scored_tasks.description: Verify progress bar renders in iTerm2 during tool execution
scored_tasks.notes: iTerm2 on macOS 13.x renders progress indicator correctly

scored_tasks.description: Verify no errors or visual artifacts in unsupported terminals
scored_tasks.notes: Standard Terminal.app ignores the escape sequences without error

decision_rationale: Feature works correctly and degrades gracefully. Security and operability gates pass (pure UI, no behavioral impact). Value gate not met (speedup_ratio 0.0 -- visibility feature, not speed). Recommend enabling on operator workstation; low risk for default-on but no measurable productivity gain to justify promotion.
